name: DeepRecall
description: SQLite-based two-tier memory retrieval system for AI agents with self-bootstrapping database and automatic cleanup
author: OpenClaw Community

search_memory_db.description: Semantic search over L1 structured facts. Returns compact formatted facts: '[YYYY-MM-DD | fact_type | source:file] content...'

read_archive_db.description: Retrieve exact raw content from L2 archive. Requires source filename from L1 search result.

source_file.description: Exact filename as obtained from L1 search result

cleanup_raw_files.description: Clean up raw .md session files while preserving database. Only affects temporary files, not permanent L1/L2 data.

retention_days.description: Keep files newer than N days

max_size_kb.description: Maximum total file size in KB

summarize_memory_files.description: Summarize raw memory files using LLM and store structured facts to database. Requires OpenClaw configuration with LLM API provider.

process_file.description: Process a specific memory file (relative to memory directory)

no_store_raw.description: Do not store raw content to L2 archive
